Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start retornaAutorizacao.Call('WPAJUSTAGRUPO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 2, &AutNiv) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = 20 Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &ProTipCus1 = nullvalue(&ProTipCus1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSETCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &ProTipCus2 = nullvalue(&ProTipCus2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROSETCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &ProTipCus3 = nullvalue(&ProTipCus3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROSETCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' &ProTipCus4 = nullvalue(&ProTipCus4) &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PROSETCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters4' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 4, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 4, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 4, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 4, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters4.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 4, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &ProSts = nullvalue(&ProSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'Ajusta Produtos' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount ProRef.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &UserUpdate = !'' &Seleciona.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) &Seleciona.TooltipText = "" ProRef.ColumnClass = iif(ProSts <> Status_AtivoInativo.Ativo, !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &USerUpdate.Link = Produtos.Link('', TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, ProCod, &ParProRef) ProNom.Link = VerProduto.Link('DashBoard', EmpCod, ProCod) ProNom.LinkTarget = '_blank' For &SdtProdutosItem in &SdtProdutos If &SdtProdutosItem.ProCod = ProCod &Selecionado = true &Seleciona.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) exit//se achou sai do for do sdt else &Selecionado = false &Seleciona.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) EndIF EndFor EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled4 = True AddDynamicFilters3.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters3.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters4' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled4 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector4.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters4' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMarcar' For Each Line in grid if &Selecionado = false &AuxProCod = ProCod &AuxProNom = ProNom &SdtProdutosItem = New() &SdtProdutosItem.ProCod = &AuxProCod &SdtProdutosItem.ProNom = &AuxProNom &SdtProdutos.Add(&SdtProdutosItem) EndIf EndFor Refresh msg('Todos Produtos desta página foram marcados.') Do 'TotalizaCount' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAjustar' if &SdtProdutos.Count > 0 &webSession.Set('PRODUTOTROCA', &SdtProdutos.ToXml()) wpAjustaGrupoConfirm.Popup() Refresh else msg('Atenção! Nenhum produto selecionado.') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ProSetCod1.Visible = False &ProSetNom1.Visible = False &GrupHie1.Visible = False &NcmCod1.Visible = False &MarCod1.Visible = False &MarNom1.Visible = False &ProCatCod1.Visible = False &ProTipCus1.Visible = False &ProEmbCod1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSETCOD' &ProSetCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSETNOM' &ProSetNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'GRUPHIE' &GrupHie1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NCMCOD' &NcmCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROCATCOD' &ProCatCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROTIPCUS' &ProTipCus1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROEMBCOD' &ProEmbCod1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ProSetCod2.Visible = False &ProSetNom2.Visible = False &GrupHie2.Visible = False &NcmCod2.Visible = False &MarCod2.Visible = False &MarNom2.Visible = False &ProCatCod2.Visible = False &ProTipCus2.Visible = False &ProEmbCod2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROSETCOD' &ProSetCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROSETNOM' &ProSetNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'GRUPHIE' &GrupHie2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NCMCOD' &NcmCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROCATCOD' &ProCatCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROTIPCUS' &ProTipCus2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROEMBCOD' &ProEmbCod2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ProSetCod3.Visible = False &ProSetNom3.Visible = False &GrupHie3.Visible = False &NcmCod3.Visible = False &MarCod3.Visible = False &MarNom3.Visible = False &ProCatCod3.Visible = False &ProTipCus3.Visible = False &ProEmbCod3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROSETCOD' &ProSetCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROSETNOM' &ProSetNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'GRUPHIE' &GrupHie3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NCMCOD' &NcmCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROCATCOD' &ProCatCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROTIPCUS' &ProTipCus3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROEMBCOD' &ProEmbCod3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters4' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ProSetCod4.Visible = False &ProSetNom4.Visible = False &GrupHie4.Visible = False &NcmCod4.Visible = False &MarCod4.Visible = False &MarNom4.Visible = False &ProCatCod4.Visible = False &ProTipCus4.Visible = False &ProEmbCod4.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PROSETCOD' &ProSetCod4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PROSETNOM' &ProSetNom4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'GRUPHIE' &GrupHie4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NCMCOD' &NcmCod4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PROCATCOD' &ProCatCod4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PROTIPCUS' &ProTipCus4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PROEMBCOD' &ProEmbCod4.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROSETCOD' &ProSetCod2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROSETCOD' &ProSetCod3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' &DynamicFiltersEnabled4 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PROSETCOD' &ProSetCod4.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters4' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROREF" &ProRef.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PRONOM" &ProNom.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROSTS" &ProSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters3.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters3.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSETCOD' &ProSetCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSETNOM' &ProSetNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'GRUPHIE' &GrupHie1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NCMCOD' &NcmCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROCATCOD' &ProCatCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROTIPCUS' &ProTipCus1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROEMBCOD' &ProEmbCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROREF", "", not &ProRef.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProRef, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PRONOM", "", not &ProNom.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProNom, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROSTS", "", not &ProSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProSts, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSETCOD' AND not &ProSetCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProSetCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSETNOM' AND not &ProSetNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProSetNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'GRUPHIE' AND not &GrupHie1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &GrupHie1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NCMCOD' AND not &NcmCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NcmCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARCOD' AND not &MarCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROCATCOD' AND not &ProCatCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProCatCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROTIPCUS' AND not &ProTipCus1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProTipCus1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROEMBCOD' AND not &ProEmbCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProEmbCod1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROSETCOD' AND not &ProSetCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProSetCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROSETNOM' AND not &ProSetNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProSetNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'GRUPHIE' AND not &GrupHie2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &GrupHie2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NCMCOD' AND not &NcmCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NcmCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARCOD' AND not &MarCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROCATCOD' AND not &ProCatCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProCatCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROTIPCUS' AND not &ProTipCus2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProTipCus2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROEMBCOD' AND not &ProEmbCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProEmbCod2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROSETCOD' AND not &ProSetCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProSetCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROSETNOM' AND not &ProSetNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProSetNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'GRUPHIE' AND not &GrupHie3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &GrupHie3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NCMCOD' AND not &NcmCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NcmCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARCOD' AND not &MarCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROCATCOD' AND not &ProCatCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProCatCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROTIPCUS' AND not &ProTipCus3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProTipCus3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROEMBCOD' AND not &ProEmbCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProEmbCod3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled4 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector4 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PROSETCOD' AND not &ProSetCod4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProSetCod4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PROSETNOM' AND not &ProSetNom4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProSetNom4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'GRUPHIE' AND not &GrupHie4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &GrupHie4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NCMCOD' AND not &NcmCod4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NcmCod4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'MARCOD' AND not &MarCod4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarCod4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PROCATCOD' AND not &ProCatCod4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProCatCod4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PROTIPCUS' AND not &ProTipCus4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProTipCus4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PROEMBCOD' AND not &ProEmbCod4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProEmbCod4.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Produto" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event limpar_campo.Click if &Count > 0 &SdtProdutos.Clear() &Count = 0 msg('Todos Produtos foram desmarcados.') Refresh EndIf EndEvent Event &Seleciona.Click &AuxProCod = ProCod &AuxProNom = ProNom Do 'loadSDT' EndEvent Sub 'TotalizaCount' &Count.SetEmpty() &Count = &SdtProdutos.Count EndSub Sub 'loadSDT' if &Selecionado = false &SdtProdutosItem = New() &SdtProdutosItem.ProCod = &AuxProCod &SdtProdutosItem.ProNom = &AuxProNom &SdtProdutos.Add(&SdtProdutosItem) else //esta true For &SdtProdutosItem in &SdtProdutos If &SdtProdutosItem.ProCod = &AuxProCod &Index = &SdtProdutos.IndexOf(&SdtProdutosItem) &SdtProdutos.Remove(&Index) Exit EndIF EndFor EndIf Do 'TotalizaCount' Refresh EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
